Container.Name: farm-manager-db
Container.Overview: PostgreSQL 16 with PostGIS 3.4 — the database backend for Farm Manager. IMPORTANT: Add this container FIRST, before farm-manager-app. Create the custom Docker network before starting either container: Open Unraid terminal and run: docker network create farm-manager

Config.Name: Database storage
Config.Description: Where Postgres stores the database files. Keep this on your array (ideally on a cache drive for performance).

Config.Name: POSTGRES_USER
Config.Description: Postgres superuser name. Leave as 'farm' unless you change DATABASE_URL in the app container too.

Config.Name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Database password. Choose something strong — this is used by the app via DATABASE_URL.
